content: {"interpretation": "Across days 3-8 Patient K's estradiol accelerated from 210 to 4200 pg/mL (+61.5%/day into day 8) with 19 mature follicles and PCOS, driving a HIGH OHSS composite tier. Progesterone reached 1.6 ng/mL, at or above the 1.5 ng/mL day-8 threshold, indicating premature luteinization.", "recommended_action": "Withhold the standard trigger and escalate to the biologist: consider coasting, a GnRH-agonist trigger swap, or freeze-all per the OHSS SOP, and consider freeze-all for the elevated progesterone. Shorten monitoring to 24 hours."}
